records.question: Which contestants received votes on or before 2018-03-09 19:03:36 from states listed in the area code state data?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT contestants.contestant_number FROM contestants
JOIN votes ON contestants.contestant_number = votes.contestant_number
JOIN area_code_state ON votes.state = area_code_state.state
WHERE votes.created <= '2018-03-09 19:03:36'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.contestant_number
FROM CONTESTANTS c
JOIN VOTES v ON c.contestant_number = v.contestant_number
JOIN AREA_CODE_STATE a ON v.state = a.state
WHERE v.created <= '2018-03-09 19:03:36'

records.question: Which contestants named Tabatha Gehling received votes on or after 2018-03-09 19:03:21?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT contestants.contestant_number FROM contestants
JOIN votes ON contestants.contestant_number = votes.contestant_number
WHERE contestants.contestant_name = 'Tabatha Gehling' AND votes.created >= '2018-03-09 19:03:21'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT contestant_number
FROM CONTESTANTS
WHERE contestant_name = 'Tabatha Gehling'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM VOTES
    WHERE VOTES.contestant_number = CONTESTANTS.contestant_number
      AND created >= '2018-03-09 19:03:21'
  )

records.question: Which contestant has the exact name Nita Coster?

records.pred_sql: SELECT contestant_number FROM CONTESTANTS WHERE contestant_name = 'Nita Coster'

records.question: Which contestants named Alana Bregman received votes created exactly on 2018-03-09 19:03:40 from phone numbers at most 5112677315?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT contestants.contestant_number FROM contestants
JOIN votes ON contestants.contestant_number = votes.contestant_number
WHERE votes.phone_number <= 5112677315 AND contestants.contestant_name = 'Alana Bregman' AND votes.created = '2018-03-09 19:03:40'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.contestant_number
FROM CONTESTANTS c
JOIN VOTES v ON c.contestant_number = v.contestant_number
WHERE c.contestant_name = 'Alana Bregman'
  AND v.phone_number <= 5112677315
  AND v.created = '2018-03-09 19:03:40'

records.question: Which contestants named Alana Bregman received votes from phone number 5112677315 on or after 2018-03-09 19:03:40?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT contestants.contestant_number FROM contestants
JOIN votes ON contestants.contestant_number = votes.contestant_number
WHERE votes.created >= '2018-03-09 19:03:40' AND votes.phone_number = 5112677315 AND contestants.contestant_name = 'Alana Bregman'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT contestant_number
FROM CONTESTANTS
WHERE contestant_name = 'Alana Bregman'
  AND contestant_number IN (

    WHERE created >= '2018-03-09 19:03:40'
      AND phone_number = 5112677315
  )

records.question: Who is the contestant named Kelly Clauss that has received votes?
